board_csa_architect.notes: Clean migration from file to Postgres. user_settings table is a reusable generic pattern. Schema is sound — JSONB value with (user_id, setting_key) uniqueness.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: RLS on user_settings is straightforward — own-data-only policy. No PII exposure. No cross-tenant risk. Anti-AC prevents layout data leakage between users.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: No AI/VRAM impact. This is a storage migration + tier-curated defaults. JSONB is efficient for flexible settings. No prompt or model changes.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Eliminates widgets.json file dependency — no more file permission issues in Docker. Postgres is already the primary store. Clean deployment.

board_red_team.notes: Conditions: (1) Rate-limit PUT endpoint to prevent settings-flooding DoS, (2) Validate JSONB size — cap at 100KB to prevent storage abuse, (3) Add index on (user_id, setting_key) for query performance. Failure scenarios: unbounded JSONB growth, concurrent write races on same user, cascade delete orphaning settings if users table FK changes.
